parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json
const body = data.body ?? data
const phone     = body.phone      ?? ''
const text      = (body.text      ?? '').trim()
const messageId = body.messageId  ?? ''
const phoneNumberId = body.phoneNumberId ?? ''

if (!phone || !messageId) return []

return [{ json: { phone, incomingText: text.toLowerCase(), rawText: text, messageId, phoneNumberId } }]

parameters.query: SELECT current_state, context, mode FROM conversation_sessions WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{ $json.phone }}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO financing_clients (
  whatsapp_number, person_type,
  name, cpf_encrypted, birth_date, civil_status, phone, email, city, state, monthly_income_encrypted,
  has_co_participant, co_participant_income_encrypted,
  company_name, cnpj_encrypted, responsible_name, company_revenue_encrypted
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.personType ?? "" }}', ''), 'pf')::person_type,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.name ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.cpf ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.birthDate ? $json.clientPayload.birthDate.split("/").reverse().join("-") : "" }}', '')::date,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.civilStatus ?? "" }}', '')::civil_status,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.phone ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.email ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.city ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.state ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.monthlyIncome ? String($json.clientPayload.monthlyIncome) : "" }}', '')::text,
  TRUE = {{ $json.clientPayload.hasCoParticipant ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }},
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.coParticipantIncome ? String($json.clientPayload.coParticipantIncome) : "" }}', '')::text,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.companyName ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.cnpj ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.responsibleName ?? "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.clientPayload.companyRevenue ? String($json.clientPayload.companyRevenue) : "" }}', '')::text
)
ON CONFLICT (whatsapp_number) DO UPDATE SET
  person_type                  = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.person_type, financing_clients.person_type),
  name                         = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, financing_clients.name),
  cpf_encrypted                = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.cpf_encrypted, financing_clients.cpf_encrypted),
  birth_date                   = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.birth_date, financing_clients.birth_date),
  civil_status                 = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.civil_status, financing_clients.civil_status),
  phone                        = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, financing_clients.phone),
  email                        = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.email, financing_clients.email),
  city                         = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.city, financing_clients.city),
  state                        = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.state, financing_clients.state),
  monthly_income_encrypted     = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.monthly_income_encrypted, financing_clients.monthly_income_encrypted),
  has_co_participant           = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.has_co_participant, financing_clients.has_co_participant),
  co_participant_income_encrypted = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.co_participant_income_encrypted, financing_clients.co_participant_income_encrypted),
  company_name                 = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company_name, financing_clients.company_name),
  cnpj_encrypted               = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.cnpj_encrypted, financing_clients.cnpj_encrypted),
  responsible_name             = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.responsible_name, financing_clients.responsible_name),
  company_revenue_encrypted    = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company_revenue_encrypted, financing_clients.company_revenue_encrypted)
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (whatsapp_number, current_state, context, last_activity)
VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', '{{ $json.newState }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.newContext) }}'::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (whatsapp_number)
DO UPDATE SET current_state = '{{ $json.newState }}', context = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.newContext) }}'::jsonb, last_activity = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()

SELECT id, person_type, name, cpf_encrypted, birth_date::text, civil_status, phone, email, city, state, monthly_income_encrypted::text, has_co_participant, co_participant_income_encrypted::text, company_name, cnpj_encrypted, responsible_name, company_revenue_encrypted::text FROM financing_clients WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Extrair Mensagem').first().json.phone }}' LIMIT 1

SELECT financing_type, requested_amount, down_payment_amount, financed_amount, term_months, created_at FROM financing_simulations WHERE whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Extrair Mensagem').first().json.phone }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
